chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.5517of 2015 Date Order with signature of Judge PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.22842/15 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 05.10.2016 None for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Asadullah, Advocate for LDA Choudhry Muhammad Arif, Advocate for KMC along with Muhammad Asim Raza, Addl. Director H.R. KMC Mr.Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. ------ 1 & 2. Though the petitioner and his counsel are called absent but in the connected petition No.5876/2015, it is clearly stated by the counsel for KMC that the petitioner Kamaluddin has joined the KMC and in the present petition he had challenged withdrawal of up-gradation and promotion in the LDA. In the circumstances, when he is no more in the LDA and joined his parent department, this petition, in our view, has become infructuous, which is disposed of accordingly along with the listed the application. Judge Judge Jamil
